chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلٍ وَ ابْنِ بُكَيْرٍ وَ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ الْمُظَاهِرُ إِذَا طَلَّقَ سَقَطَتْ عَنْهُ الْكَفَّارَةُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, and Ibn Bukeyr, and Hammad Bin Usman,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The perpetrator (committer) of the Zahaar, when he divorces, the expiation drops off from him’.
